description: Unverified allegations must be attributed to a named source, not stated as fact
pattern_hint: allegedly|reportedly|is accused of|is believed to have|sources claim
suggested_rewrite_hint: Attribute to a named source or official document: 'According to the CBI chargesheet...' or 'Company X denied the allegation.'

description: Statements about ongoing court cases must include sub judice caveat and avoid prejudging outcome
pattern_hint: guilty|convicted|proved|found to have|judgment is clear|court will rule
suggested_rewrite_hint: Use 'is facing charges of' or 'the court is yet to rule' — never prejudge verdicts. Add: 'The matter is sub judice.'

description: Personal financial information of private individuals (non-public figures) must not be published
pattern_hint: personal bank account|personal assets worth|private net worth|individual tax|personal property valued
suggested_rewrite_hint: Remove private individual data. Public figures' declared assets from public filings are permitted; private individuals' personal finances must be omitted.

description: Quotes must be attributed to a named, verifiable source
pattern_hint: a source said|anonymous sources|industry insiders|people familiar|those in the know
suggested_rewrite_hint: Use named sources or rephrase as industry context without quotes. Example: 'According to analysts at Goldman Sachs...' instead of 'sources say...'

description: Health claims about products or individuals require medical attribution
pattern_hint: cures|proven to treat|guaranteed to heal|medically proven|clinically shown
suggested_rewrite_hint: Attribute to a named study with journal citation: 'A 2024 AIIMS study published in The Lancet found...' or remove unsubstantiated health claims.
